name: webnotes-builder
description: Converts course material (PDF slides, markdown, txt, images, past exams, assignments) into a complete interactive HTML study site. Two goal modes: PASS (mines past-exam patterns, builds an exam-prep page with model answers as the centerpiece, teaches only what's needed to pass) and MASTER (full-fidelity beginner-friendly coverage of all material). Includes content-fidelity guarantees, a chunked multi-session workflow with state persistence, and exam-miner / chapter-writer / reviewer subagents.
